description_long: This is a black bowler hat with a classic rounded crown and a short, upturned brim. The hat features a pair of bronze-colored steampunk goggles attached to the front, adding a distinctive and decorative touch. The goggles have round lenses and are secured by a dark strap that wraps around the base of the crown. The surface of the hat appears to be made of a felt-like material, giving it a matte and slightly textured finish. The overall design combines traditional Victorian-era style with industrial steampunk aesthetics. The interior is likely lined with fabric for comfort and structure.
description: A black bowler hat with a rounded crown, short upturned brim, and bronze steampunk goggles attached to the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black bowler hat with bronze steampunk goggles prominently displayed.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the cylindrical shape of the crown and the side profile of the attached goggles.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain back of the hat without any decorative elements.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the goggles partially visible, emphasizing the hat's rounded form.
